sentences.text: The wheelbarrow is not in good condition because one side is missing, and the wheel-spokes are broken.
Despite its condition, the Miller still wanted to give it to Hans.
The Miller said he was very generous, and many people might think he was foolish for giving it away.
He believes that being generous is important in friendship, and he already has a new wheelbarrow for himself.
